# Finance Platform

> Modern financial infrastructure for businesses — banking, corporate cards, global payments, and expense management unified in one platform.

Finance Platform is an all-in-one financial platform designed for startups and growing companies. It provides FDIC-insured business banking, smart corporate cards, international payment capabilities, and automated expense management.

## Pages

- [Home](/index.html): Overview of all products and platform capabilities.
- [Business Banking](/business-banking.html): FDIC-insured business checking with no fees, instant ACH transfers, and accounting integrations.
- [Corporate Cards](/corporate-cards.html): Smart corporate cards with spend controls, real-time visibility, and instant card issuance.
- [Global Banking](/global-banking.html): International payments with competitive FX rates, multi-currency wallets, and local account details.
- [Expense Management](/expense-management.html): Automated expense reporting, approval workflows, receipt capture, and reconciliation.

## Products

### Business Banking
FDIC-insured business checking designed for modern companies. Key features:
- No monthly fees or minimum balance requirements
- Instant ACH transfers between accounts
- Real-time balance and transaction visibility
- Integrations with QuickBooks, Xero, and more
- Powerful APIs and batch payments for scale

### Corporate Cards
Smart corporate cards with built-in spend controls and real-time visibility. Key features:
- Custom spending limits by card, category, or merchant
- Instant card issuance — virtual and physical
- Real-time transaction notifications
- Receipt capture and automatic categorization
- Higher limits than traditional business cards

### Global Banking
Send and receive international payments with competitive FX rates. Key features:
- Competitive foreign exchange rates with transparent pricing
- Local account details (IBAN, SWIFT, and more)
- Multi-currency wallets
- International wire transfers
- No hidden fees

### Expense Management
Automate expense reporting, approvals, and reconciliation. Key features:
- Automatic receipt capture and matching
- Customizable approval workflows
- Policy enforcement and compliance
- One-click reconciliation with accounting software
- Real-time spend analytics and reporting
